Left longest: 3
Right longest: 7

Left winner: I none, C none, AND lost, OR lost, XOR none, AND-NOT win, OR-NOT lost
Right winner: I win, C none, AND none, OR none, XOR none, AND-NOT none, OR-NOT none

Longest Left: AND-NOT 25-0 36-1 47-2
Longest Right: I 1-7 0-6 7-5 6-4 5-3 4-2 3-1

7 + 3 = 10 > 8
Left will be truncated to length 8 - 7 = 1

Truncated left: AND-NOT 25-0 truncated
Truncated right: I 1-7 0-6 7-5 6-4 5-3 4-2 3-1

0 AND-NOT 25

Preferred from left
0 AND-NOT 25
1 I 3
2 I 4
3 I 5
4 I 6
5 I 7
6 I 0
7 I 1

Matched
0 AND-NOT 25
1 I 3
2 I 4
3 I 5
4 I 6
5 I 7
6 I 0
7 I 1

Applying to 00101101
Input
I 0 = 0
I 1 = 0
I 2 = 1
I 3 = 0
I 4 = 1
I 5 = 1
I 6 = 0
I 7 = 1
Output
0 AND-NOT 25 = AND(I 2,I 5n) = AND(I 2,NOT(I 5)) = AND(1,NOT(1)) = AND(1,0) = 0
1 I 3 = 0
2 I 4 = 1
3 I 5 = 1
4 I 6 = 0
5 I 7 = 1
6 I 0 = 0
7 I 1 = 0

\boxed{00110100}
